title: Bridging Design Systems and Code with MCP and AI Agents
summary: IBM Technology explains how design systems and context engineering guide AI agents in modern software development. The video covers how MCP and AI agents work together to build consistent, correct applications by leveraging structured design guidance.
writeup: The video explains how design systems and context engineering steer AI agents during software development, connecting structured design guidance to generated code through the Model Context Protocol (MCP). It matters because consistency and correctness break down when agents lack access to a project's established design rules. The key takeaways: design systems supply the structured guidance agents need, MCP serves as the link between that guidance and the agents, and the two together support building applications that stay consistent and correct.
